emergency.label: Tourist Police
emergency.number: 1155 (English-speaking, first call for most tourist issues)

entryRequirements.visaNote: Many nationalities visa-exempt for tourism (typically 30-60 days depending on nationality). All travelers must complete the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) before/on arrival.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Rabbit Card (BTS Skytrain) — MRT uses separate token/card system, unification improving
mainSystems: Tuk-tuks (short trips only, agree price first)
transportInfo.note: Always insist on the meter in a taxi, or use Grab.

majorEventsNote: Songkran (mid-April) is the single biggest travel disruption/celebration — city-wide water fights, transport and hotel prices spike hard. Confirm exact lunar-calendar holiday dates closer to travel.
